components.label: Untimely responses
components.evidence: 1.7% of cases not answered on time

components.label: Closed without relief
components.evidence: 87.4% of closed cases ended without monetary or non-monetary relief

components.label: Issue concentration
components.evidence: 47.5% of complaints share one top issue

summary: Between 2025-01-01 and 2026-06-29, the CFPB published 1,757 complaints about TransUnion. Volume is steady (last 3 months averaged 132 per month versus 128 before). The most common issue is "Incorrect information on your report" (47% of complaints), concentrated in credit reporting, credit repair services, or other personal consumer reports. The company responded on time to 98% of cases; 87.4% of closed cases ended without relief. Overall risk signal: Elevated (57/100). This is an exploratory signal from public complaint data, not a regulatory, legal, or investment conclusion.

regulatory.note: SAMPLE public-record cross-reference — synthetic, illustrative values for offline demo. Replaced by live FDIC / SEC EDGAR / GLEIF lookups when ingested in CI.
